query:
SELECT 'supervisores' as tabela, chaveJ, nome, pctConsig, pctConsorcio, pctCc FROM supervisores WHERE ativo=1 LIMIT 10;
SELECT DISTINCT supervisor, COUNT(*) as qtde FROM consignados WHERE supervisor IS NOT NULL AND supervisor != '' GROUP BY supervisor LIMIT 10;
